title: manilkara udoido
intro: Manilkara udoido is a plant species native to West Africa, commonly known as the African star apple or Udara. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Manilkara udoido include its ability to treat fever, malaria, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an antidote for snake and spider bites. Herbal preparations of the plant's fruit, leaves, and roots are used in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
